hero.title: Dr. Jihane El Masbahi
hero.subtitle: Medical Cabinet & Ultrasound
hero.tagline: Trusted medicine close to you. State-of-the-art diagnostics, personalized follow-ups, and quality care.
hero.scroll_tip: Scroll down to enter the cabinet

ui.success_message: Thank you for your trust. We will contact you shortly to confirm your time slot.

services.title: Our Medical Services
services.subtitle: A comprehensive range of care and diagnostic examinations

general.title: Family Medicine
general.desc: Comprehensive medical consultations for adults, children, and infants, providing continuous healthcare for the entire family.

ultrasound.title: Ultrasound Scans
ultrasound.desc: High-precision general and obstetrical ultrasound scans for pregnancy tracking and other diagnostic assessments.

preventative.title: Electrocardiography (ECG)
preventative.desc: ECG tests to monitor heart rhythm and support early screening for cardiovascular conditions.

nursing.title: Diabetes & Hypertension
nursing.desc: Personalized management, lifestyle counseling, and continuous monitoring for diabetic and hypertensive patients.

about.title: Dr. Jihane El Masbahi
about.subtitle: General Practitioner & Family Doctor
about.p1: Former physician at the Ibn Sina University Hospital Center (CHU) of Rabat and former physician at the Regional Hospital Center (CHR) of Guelmim, Dr. Jihane El Masbahi offers extensive clinical expertise in public health.
about.p2: Dedicated to family-oriented healthcare, she welcomes you to her modern medical clinic equipped with state-of-the-art diagnostic tools for ultrasound scanning, electrocardiography (ECG), pregnancy tracking, and chronic disease management (diabetes and hypertension).

gallery.title: Virtual Clinic Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Explore our modern medical spaces and clinical equipment

reception.title: Reception & Welcome Area
reception.desc: A spacious and comfortable waiting room with warm aesthetics designed to make your visit as pleasant as possible.

consultation1.title: Diagnostic & Consultation Area
consultation1.desc: Equipped with modern medical examination devices and ultrasound scanning tools for immediate diagnostic feedback.

consultation2.title: Doctor's Consultation Desk
consultation2.desc: A confidential and welcoming setting for discussing your health questions and history with the doctor.

treatment.title: Treatment & Patient Monitoring Room
treatment.desc: Dedicated to minor surgical procedures, IV administrations, ECG cardiac monitoring, and emergency triage.

office.title: Secondary Clinical Desk
office.desc: Analytical clinical workstation and administrative space for medical records, ensuring systematic and thorough health follow-ups.

booking.title: Request an Appointment
booking.subtitle: Fill out this form and our team will get in touch with you shortly.
booking.name: Full Name
booking.disclaimer: Note: This request does not guarantee a booking. Our receptionist will call or message you to finalize and confirm your slot.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Clinic location, opening hours, and contact details

contact.emergency_val: In case of a medical emergency, call 150 or 15
